div.p: Specification: ELF Symbol Resolution for Tentative Definitions (SHN_COMMON) SHT_COMMON Detection → Size Comparison → Largest Wins → .bss Allocation

ul.li: COMMON symbols do not exist in any section of the input object file.
The st_shndx value 0xFFF2 is a "special index" indicating tentative placement.
The Linker must manually reserve space in the .bss section for the resulting global definition.
Runtime: OS mmaps anonymous memory to fulfill the .bss segment requirements.

g.text: Result: Largest size wins. Alignment = MAX(AlignA, AlignB).
Result: Strong (initialized) wins. COMMON is ignored/merged.
Result: COMMON wins over WEAK; COMMON promotes to Strong.
